name: DoIP_SetIdentificationRequestEID, DoIP_SetIdentificationRequestVIN
title: DoIP_SetIdentificationRequestEID, DoIP_SetIdentificationRequestVIN
description: Configures the Vehicle Identification Request Message sent by a tester.

parameters.name: EID
parameters.description: Send an entity ID in the message, e.g. a MAC address.

description: The message can also be configured from the DoIP.INI file.
